description: Initial screen state: A 'Task' modal is displayed over a Google search page on a mobile browser. The modal contains instructions for the user testing session.
frame_description: A task instruction modal is visible over a dimmed Google search page.

description: User clicks the 'Start task' button to begin the testing session.
frame_description: The user's finger (represented by a white dot) taps the 'Start task' button at the bottom of the screen.

description: The task modal closes, revealing the Google search homepage.
frame_description: The modal is gone, and the Google search page with a search bar is now fully visible.

description: User clicks on the Google search bar to focus it for text entry.
frame_description: The cursor taps the search bar in the center of the Google homepage.

description: The mobile keyboard slides up from the bottom, and a list of trending searches appears below the search bar.
frame_description: The keyboard is now visible at the bottom of the screen, and the search bar is focused.

description: User types 'homelone australia bank st george' into the search bar.
frame_description: The search query is being entered into the search field.

description: User clicks the search button on the keyboard.
frame_description: The cursor taps the blue search icon on the bottom right of the keyboard.

description: The page navigates to the Google search results for the query.
page_title: homelone australia bank st george - Google Search
frame_description: The screen flashes white as the new page loads, then displays search results.

description: User scrolls down the search results page.
frame_description: The search results page moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: User scrolls down the search results page.
frame_description: More search results are revealed as the user scrolls.

description: User scrolls down to the bottom of the current results view.
frame_description: The 'Aussie' search result becomes visible on screen.

description: User hovers over the 'Aussie' search result link.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the Aussie website link.

description: User clicks on the 'Aussie' search result.
frame_description: The cursor taps the main link for the Aussie website result.

description: The page navigates to the Aussie website.
frame_description: The Aussie homepage loads, showing a 'Compare low home loan rates' headline.

description: User scrolls down the Aussie homepage.
frame_description: The user scrolls past the hero section to see the call-to-action buttons.

description: User clicks the 'I want to refinance' button.
frame_description: The cursor taps the first large white button on the purple background.

description: A loading screen with the Aussie logo appears.
frame_description: A white screen with a purple 'L' shaped loading animation and the text 'Loading.... You're moving along nicely.'

description: The first question of the refinance flow appears: 'What is your current loan balance?'.
frame_description: A form page with a text input field for loan balance is displayed.

description: User clicks on the loan balance input field.
frame_description: The cursor taps inside the text box labeled with a dollar sign.

description: The mobile keyboard appears.
frame_description: The keyboard is visible at the bottom of the screen.

description: User types '1,000,000' into the loan balance field.
frame_description: The number '1,000,000' is entered into the input field.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT' button.
frame_description: The cursor taps the purple 'NEXT' button below the input field.

description: The next question appears: 'Please tell us more about your current loan.'.
frame_description: A new form page with fields for interest rate and fixed rate status is shown.

description: User clicks on the interest rate input field.
frame_description: The cursor taps the text box labeled with a percentage sign.

description: The mobile keyboard appears.
frame_description: The keyboard is visible at the bottom of the screen.

description: User selects the 'I don't know, skip' toggle.
frame_description: The cursor taps the toggle switch next to 'I don't know, skip'.

description: User scrolls down the form.
frame_description: The user scrolls to reveal the 'Are you currently on a fixed rate?' question.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT' button.
frame_description: The cursor taps the purple 'NEXT' button at the bottom of the form.

description: User selects the 'No' radio button.
frame_description: The cursor taps the radio button labeled 'No'.

description: The 'No' radio button is highlighted as selected.
frame_description: The 'No' option now has a purple border and a filled circle.

description: Page navigates to the 'Who is your current lender' screen.
frame_description: The screen transitions to a new question asking for the current lender with a search box.

description: User types 'St george' into the lender search field.
frame_description: The text 'St george' is being entered into the search box as the segment ends.

description: User selects 'St George' from the search results dropdown.
frame_description: A list of suggestions is visible below the search box, and the user taps the first one.

description: Page navigates to the property value estimation screen.
page_title: How much do you think your property is worth?
frame_description: The screen changes to ask 'How much do you think your property is worth?' with a currency input field.

description: User clicks on the property value input field.
frame_description: The input field is focused and the numeric keyboard appears.

description: User types '1,100,000' into the property value field.
frame_description: The numbers are entered into the field, which automatically formats with commas.

description: Page navigates to the refinancing goal screen.
frame_description: The screen transitions to show several options for refinancing goals.

description: User clicks the 'Pay off loan faster' option.
frame_description: The user taps one of the large buttons representing a goal.

description: Page navigates to the property usage screen.
page_title: How will this property be used?
frame_description: The screen changes to ask if the property is a home or an investment.

description: User clicks the 'Major lender' feature card.
frame_description: The 'Major lender' card is highlighted after the user taps it.

description: User clicks the 'NEXT' button.
frame_description: The purple 'NEXT' button at the bottom of the screen is tapped.

description: Page navigates to the credit history screen.
page_title: What do you think your credit history is?
frame_description: The screen shows options for credit history like 'Excellent', 'Average', etc.

description: Page navigates to the income source screen.
page_title: How do you earn your income?
frame_description: The screen shows options like 'I'm an employee', 'I run my own business', etc.

description: User clicks on the first name input field.
frame_description: The input field is focused and the keyboard appears.

description: User types 'JANE DOE' into the name field.
frame_description: The name 'JANE DOE' is entered into the text box.

description: Page navigates to a loading screen.
frame_description: The screen goes white with a loading indicator.

description: Loading message 'Loading.... You're moving along nicely.' appears.
frame_description: Text appears on the loading screen.

description: Page navigates to the phone number entry screen.
frame_description: The screen shows a phone number input field with a country code selector.

description: User clicks on the phone number input field.
frame_description: The input field is focused and the numeric keyboard appears.

description: User types a phone number into the field.
frame_description: The digits are entered into the phone number field.

description: User types '223885' into the mobile phone number input field.
frame_description: Aussie home loan page with a phone number input field and a 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button.

description: User clicks the 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button.
frame_description: The 'PROTECT MY ACCOUNT' button is highlighted as the user clicks it.

description: An error message 'Something Went Wrong' appears below the phone number field.
frame_description: A red error box with the text 'Something Went Wrong' is visible.

description: Page navigates to a loading screen and then to the Aussie home loan rates page.
frame_description: A loading screen with a purple 'u' logo followed by the Aussie 'home loan rates' page.

description: Page navigates to Google search results for 'home loan australia bank st george'.
frame_description: Google search results page for home loans.

description: User scrolls down and then back up the Google search results page.
frame_description: The user is scrolling through various bank search results like Bendigo Bank and Aussie.

description: Page navigates to the ubank home loans page.
frame_description: The ubank home loans landing page with 'Apply now' and 'Book an appointment' buttons.

description: User scrolls down the ubank home loans page.
frame_description: Scrolling past home loan rate information on the ubank site.

description: User scrolls down through various sections of the ubank page, including 'Perks of refinancing', 'Why refinance', and 'Home loan eligibility', then scrolls back up.
frame_description: The user scrolls through detailed information sections on the ubank page.

description: Page navigates back to the Google search results.
frame_description: Google search results page is visible again.

description: User scrolls down the Google search results page.
frame_description: Scrolling past search results for St. George Bank.

description: Page navigates to the St. George home loans page.
frame_description: St. George home loans landing page with a green header.

description: User hovers over the 'Calculators and tools' icon.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the calculator icon in the grid.

description: User clicks on 'Calculators and tools'.
frame_description: The calculator icon is activated.

description: Page navigates to the St. George home loan calculators and tools page.
frame_description: The 'Home loan calculators and tools' page loads.

description: User scrolls down the page to find the refinance calculator section.
frame_description: The user is on the St.George Bank mobile website, scrolling past the 'Home loan repayment calculator' and 'Stamp duty calculator'.

description: User clicks on the 'Loan term left' dropdown menu.
frame_description: The user taps the dropdown field for 'Loan term left' which currently displays '20'.

description: The dropdown menu for loan term years opens.
frame_description: A list of numbers representing years (11 to 30) appears in a scrollable picker overlay.

description: User selects '25' from the loan term dropdown.
frame_description: The user selects the value '25' from the open dropdown menu.

description: The dropdown closes and the calculator results update to reflect a 25-year loan term.
frame_description: The dropdown menu disappears and the 'Current repayment' and 'Your savings could be' values update.

description: A 'Need help?' modal appears on the screen.
frame_description: A green and white modal with the text 'Need help?' and a 'Chat now' button appears over the calculator.

description: User clicks the 'X' button to close the 'Need help?' modal.
frame_description: The user taps the close icon in the top right corner of the help modal.

description: The 'Need help?' modal closes.
frame_description: The modal disappears, revealing the full refinance calculator results again.

description: User scrolls through the refinance calculator results.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to see 'Your savings could be', 'Your new repayments could be', and interest rate details.

description: User navigates back to Google search results.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the St.George website back to a Google search results page.

description: User scrolls through Google search results for home loans.
frame_description: The user is scrolling through search results from Suncorp Bank, Bendigo Bank, and Aussie.com.au.

description: User clicks on the Google search bar.
frame_description: The user taps the search bar at the top of the Google results page.

description: The search bar becomes active and the keyboard appears.
frame_description: The search bar is highlighted and the mobile keyboard slides up from the bottom.

description: User modifies the search query to 'homelone australia banks'.
frame_description: The user deletes part of the previous query and types 'banks' into the search field.

description: User submits the search and new results load.
frame_description: The page refreshes to show search results for 'homelone australia banks'.

description: User scrolls through the search results.
frame_description: The user scrolls past results for Macquarie Bank and other financial institutions.

description: User clicks on the search bar.
frame_description: The user taps the search bar to edit the query again.

description: User types 'refinanching australia banks' into the search bar.
frame_description: The user types the word 'refinanching' into the search field.

description: User submits the search and new results load.
frame_description: The page refreshes to show search results for 'refinancing australia banks'.

description: User scrolls through the search results.
frame_description: The user scrolls down the list of results, looking at Macquarie Bank and Ubank.

description: User clicks on the Macquarie Bank search result.
frame_description: The user taps on the heading for the Macquarie Bank refinance home loan result.

description: User navigates to the Macquarie Bank website.
frame_description: The Macquarie Bank home loan page begins to load.

description: User scrolls down the Macquarie Bank home loan page.
frame_description: The user scrolls down to see interest rates and features of Macquarie's home loans.

description: User navigates back to Google search results.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the Macquarie Bank site back to the Google search results page.

description: User clicks the 'End task' button.
frame_description: The user taps the red 'End task' button in the testing interface overlay.
